BusinessName.BusinessNameLine1Txt: SONOMA COUNTY INDIAN HEALTH PROJECT INC

IRS990.ActivityOrMissionDesc: TO CONTINUALLY IMPROVE AND MAINTAIN A COMPREHENSIVE HEALTH CARE SYSTEM.
IRS990.MissionDesc: TO CONTINUALLY IMPROVE AND MAINTAIN A COMPREHENSIVE HEALTH CARE SYSTEM TO SERVE THE NEEDS AND TRADITIONAL VALUES OF OUR AMERICAN INDIAN COMMUNITY.
IRS990.Desc: HEALTH CARE FACILITY, PROVIDING MEDICAL, DENTAL, NUTRITIONAL, BEHAVIORAL HEALTH, PHARMACY, AND HEALTH EDUCATION SERVICES.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 11B
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: PRESENTED TO AND REVIEWED BY THE BOARD.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 12C
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: MONITORED DURING THE COURSE OF BUSINESS THROUGH PROPER APPROVAL OF PURCHASE REQUISITIONS, OTHER EXPENDITURES AND TRAVEL REQUESTS.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 15
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: CONDUCT A COMPENSATION AND BENEFITS STUDY FOR MARKET AVERAGES. REVIEW AND APPROVAL OF THE BOARD.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION C, LINE 19
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: GOVERNING DOCUMENTS, POLICIES AND FINANCIAL STATEMENTS ARE AVAILABLE UPON REQUEST.
